name: sauce-evidence-peer
comment: Sauce evidence-ledger PEER as a self-contained Pear/bare app. Dependencies + package-lock.json mirror intercom's VETTED, mutually-compatible tree EXACTLY (trac-peer @ d108f52, trac-msb @ 5088921, trac-wallet 1.0.1, hypercore 11.18.3, autobase 7.20.1, …) — a fresh `npm install` resolves NEWER transitive versions that crash hypercore-storage encoding, so reproduce via this lock. bare-http1 (control endpoint) + the crypto/fs/path/util bare-node-* aliases come through the same tree. node_modules is gitignored (regenerate with `npm ci`).
